race.comment: TASSORT WE WANT (4) rolled forward and won two back before a disappointing effort last start when jumping as the race favourite. He settled at the back on that occasion and never featured, though Faithfull takes the ride this time. Can settle closer this time around and an improved run is on the cards. KUNAPIPI (11) disappointed last start but was in better form at this track and trip prior. This looks a more suitable race and things look to work out nicely for her now. Can bounce back to her best. CHEEKY CHARLOTTE (1) turned in an eye-catching run over 1000m at this track last time, ridden back before coming home with a powerful run to finish third. Will spot them a start but watch for her late. WAR TACTICS (13) is experiencing a long win drought, extended last start when fifth over 1000m at this track after he got a long way back in the run. Good enough on his day and can play a prominent role. LE TROY (6) is next best.
